creator: alex@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback

I'm sorry, there have been too many changes to the Makefile in mew/ 
and others lately, so I can't apply this mega-patch. 

Also, we have a Mk/bsd.emacs.mk now, so you might want update that anyways. 

Could you please merge your work? 

Thanks
